message:
fix(sync): rewrite mutex_deadlock_test without tokio dependency

The test file was created by another agent using tokio::spawn and
#[tokio::test], which violates the project's no-tokio rule and breaks
cargo check --all-targets. Rewrote using std::thread + pin! macro +
noop waker polling, matching the existing test patterns in mutex.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
